budgetPressure.guidance: Optimize for output quality and momentum.
Use standard models by default and move cleanup to cheaper models.
Steer strongly toward the cheapest adequate model.
Finish active workstreams before opening new exploratory threads.

routingRules.escalateWhen: Source conflict, high-stakes synthesis, or ambiguous decision framing.
Cross-system architecture, repeated failing tests, or unclear runtime behavior.
Three repeated failed attempts or a production-impacting blocker.
Material business risk or dense technical ambiguity.
Tool orchestration, approvals, or state management becomes unclear.
